title: CORDEX-FPSCONV simulation protocol
author: CORDEX-FPSCONV
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document provides the simulation protocol for Convection Permitting Regional Climate Models (CPRCMs) contributing to the  CORDEX Flagship Pilot Study on Convective phenomena at high resolution over Europe and the Mediterranean  ( CORDEX-FPSCONV).
steps_raw: This document provides the simulation protocol for Convection Permitting Regional Climate Models (CPRCMs) contributing to the  CORDEX Flagship Pilot Study on Convective phenomena at high resolution over Europe and the Mediterranean  ( CORDEX-FPSCONV).
